sets.passage: The empty lot at the end of our street had been (1)___ for years, full of weeds and rubbish. Most neighbours simply (2)___ it as they passed. sets.passage: Mia and I had been best friends since we were six. So when we (1)___ over something small in our final year of school, neither of us imagined it would last.
